info.name: LMS — Quiz / MCQ (v1)
info.description:
Teacher/student MCQ quiz APIs. Each MCQ is one question with its options (exactly one flagged `is_correct`) and a per-question `time_limit` in seconds. Questions are scoped to a class (`standard_id` + `section_id`) and a `chapter_id` / `topic_id` — the same chapters/topics used by Syllabus & Content — so teacher edits, student attempts and the admin panel all read/write the same tables and stay in sync.

**Roles:**
- **Create / Update / Delete** — teacher only.
- **List** — teacher (to manage/preview) and student (to attempt). Options include `is_correct`; the app only reveals it in the post-attempt report.
- **Submit Answer** — student; persists the attempt (used for the report and visible to admin).
- **My Answers** — the caller's own answers with correctness + the correct option.

Auth: Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

request.description: Paginated active MCQ questions (each with its `options[]`). Filter by any of `standard_id`, `section_id`, `chapter_id`, `topic_id`. The app sends `chapter_id` + `topic_id` to load one topic's quiz. Each option has `option_text` + `is_correct`.

body.raw:
{
  "question_text": "Newton's first law is also called?",
  "standard_id": 1,
  "section_id": 1,
  "chapter_id": 1,
  "topic_id": 1,
  "time_limit": 60,
  "options": [
    { "option_text": "Law of Inertia", "is_correct": true },
    { "option_text": "Law of Acceleration", "is_correct": false },
    { "option_text": "Law of Action", "is_correct": false },
    { "option_text": "Law of Gravity", "is_correct": false }
  ]
}

request.description: Create one MCQ. Requires `question_text`, `standard_id`, `section_id`, an `options` array (min 2; each `option_text` + boolean `is_correct`). `chapter_id`/`topic_id` are optional but the app always sends them. `time_limit` (seconds) defaults to 60. Returns the question with its options + chapter/topic.

Teacher-only. Update a question's text / scope / `time_limit`. If `options` is sent, the question's options are fully replaced. Scoped to the caller's organization; 403 for non-teachers, 404 if not found.
Teacher-only. Delete a question and its options + any submitted answers. Scoped to the caller's organization; 403 for non-teachers, 404 if not found.

Record the student's chosen option for a question (`time_taken` in seconds). Re-submitting the same question updates the previous answer (one answer per question per user). `is_correct` is computed server-side. Persisted so the report + admin stay in sync.

The caller's own answers with correctness details: `question_text`, `selected_option` {id,text,is_correct}, `correct_option` {id,text}, `is_correct`, `time_taken`. Optionally filter by `mcq_question_id`; omit it to get all of the student's answers (paginated).
